description: Style NoteTrust spalding to come up with essentials like this pair of durable floaters. Lightweight and ultra comfy, this is an all-season essential, whether you're braving the city traffic or taking a brisk walk in the park!Product DetailsRound toed sandal with forefoot straps and ankle loops (that have Velcro closures and a pull loop)Foamy footbed with herringbone grooves for comfortThick TPU outsole with aggressive lugs for maximum tractionMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
